title: More than one line of item text in Kanban cards
excerpt:
I would like to be able to see more than one line of item text on a Kanban card. Right now it appears to be cut off after ~35 characters. 
Some of my item names start with the same text so it’s hard to tell them apart in…

posts.author: Isadora (Isadora Colmenares)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to see more than one line of item text on a Kanban card. Right now it appears to be cut off after ~35 characters.

Some of my item names start with the same text so it’s hard to tell them apart in Kanban view since only the beginning of the item text is showing.
